component.name: Archductor
component.summary: Parallel coding-agent workflow tool built around Git worktrees

description.p: Archductor gives each coding task its own isolated Git worktree, branch, terminal, agent session, diff viewer, checks panel, and pull request path.
Run Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, or shell sessions in parallel across separate workspaces from the same repository, with per-workspace runtime state and review context.

ul.li: Create and manage Git worktree workspaces
Launch coding agents and shell sessions per workspace
Run setup and dev scripts with Archductor environment variables
Review changed files, unified diffs, todos, checks, and comments
Push branches and create GitHub pull requests through gh
Detect file conflicts across parallel workspaces

description.p: Initial Linux packaging release with GUI, CLI, AppImage, native packages, and AUR support.
